brief: A pediatric dental clinic focused on making dentistry calm and fun for kids, run by a small team of specialists. The audience is parents of young children choosing a dentist. Pages should cover the practice, services (checkups, sealants, orthodontics referrals), the team, new-patient info and what to expect, and contact/booking. Lean into a friendly, reassuring aesthetic: rounded shapes, a bright but soft pastel palette, playful illustrative spot graphics, and approachable, plain-language copy.
summary: Built Sproutling Pediatric Dentistry — a 6-page kids' dental clinic site with a soft pastel design system, rounded Baloo 2/Nunito type, playful inline-SVG spot graphics, and reassuring plain-language copy across Home, About, Services, Team, Your Visit, and Contact.
